scripts.uv: command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 || (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh && source $HOME/.local/bin/env); uv sync
scripts.format: bun run format:py; bun run format:ts
scripts.format:check: bun run format:check:py; bun run format:check:ts
scripts.lint: bun run lint:py; bun run lint:ts
scripts.lint:fix: bun run lint:fix:py; bun run lint:fix:ts
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.fix: bun run lint:fix && bun run format
